pageContext.name: Kylo Ren 1oz Silver Coin
pageContext.description: Having completed the Faces of the Empire™, we now transition to the Faces of the First Order™. This menacing 1oz pure silver coin features the tormented Leader of the Knights of Ren™.   This coin is superbly crafted to replicate the shape and color of the supreme leader's helmet. To further enhance the design, some relief has been added. The Ian Rank-Broadley effigy of Her Majesty Queen Elizabeth II is engraved on the obverse, confirming it as legal tender.   Officially licensed each coin comes safely stored inside a Star Wars™ themed case, which includes a large window for display. A Certificate of Authenticity can be found on the back of the case, along with the coin's unique number in the limited mintage of 10,000. Flip open the box to find the specifications.  With this menacing piece, you'll sure be seduced to the Dark side. Order today!
